understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through all KA59 levels by positioning every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked '+'; if there are multiple goals, all must be occupied by selectables at the same time to trigger WIN, within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn controls the currently selected piece (identified by player.id/position) and MOVE actions shift it by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction unless blocked by walls/boundaries or other objects; some adjacent objects may be pushable and will move when pushed. CLICK switches control to a selectable located at the exact pixel coordinate provided (matching the coordinates used in the state object lists). Movement 'blocked' flags are only hints about adjacency and do not guarantee success/failure.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | Try moving right even though a wall is adjacent; movement hints can be misleading and may slide along boundaries.
history.reasoning: Try moving right even though a wall is adjacent; movement hints can be misleading and may slide along boundaries.

history.summary: Turn 2: CLICK | We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides; try switching to the other selectable to see if it has an escape route.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides; try switching to the other selectable to see if it has an escape route.

history.summary: Turn 3: MOVE_RIGHT | We appear enclosed but movement hints can be misleading; test if the right wall boundary allows sliding/teleport or any special interaction.
history.reasoning: We appear enclosed but movement hints can be misleading; test if the right wall boundary allows sliding/teleport or any special interaction.

history.summary: Turn 4: MOVE_RIGHT | We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides, so test the only plausible exit by trying to push into the right wall boundary.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides, so test the only plausible exit by trying to push into the right wall boundary.

history.summary: Turn 5: CLICK | We’re boxed in by walls with no movement possible; switch back to the other selectable to try reaching the goal area.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls with no movement possible; switch back to the other selectable to try reaching the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 6: MOVE_RIGHT | We appear fully enclosed by walls; test whether pushing into the internal wall causes a slide/teleport effect by moving right again.
history.reasoning: We appear fully enclosed by walls; test whether pushing into the internal wall causes a slide/teleport effect by moving right again.

history.summary: Turn 7: MOVE_RIGHT | We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides, so attempt to push/interact with the right wall to see if it yields.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides, so attempt to push/interact with the right wall to see if it yields.

history.summary: Turn 8: CLICK | We’re boxed in; switch to the other selectable to test if it can move/push past the right-side obstruction toward the goal area.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in; switch to the other selectable to test if it can move/push past the right-side obstruction toward the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 9: CLICK | Current piece at [21,21] is boxed in by walls on right/up/down; switch to the other selectable at [18,21] to continue maneuvering toward the goal.
history.reasoning: Current piece at [21,21] is boxed in by walls on right/up/down; switch to the other selectable at [18,21] to continue maneuvering toward the goal.

history.summary: Turn 10: MOVE_RIGHT | We’re boxed in by walls on all sides; the only possible change is to try pushing into the other selectable to see if it can shift.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on all sides; the only possible change is to try pushing into the other selectable to see if it can shift.

history.summary: Turn 11: CLICK | We’re fully enclosed by walls, so movement won’t work; switch to the other selectable which may have mobility to reach the goal area.
history.reasoning: We’re fully enclosed by walls, so movement won’t work; switch to the other selectable which may have mobility to reach the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 12: MOVE_UP | We’re adjacent to the goal cluster; try stepping onto the goal tile above since goals are non-collidable and may allow movement despite the wall hint.
history.reasoning: We’re adjacent to the goal cluster; try stepping onto the goal tile above since goals are non-collidable and may allow movement despite the wall hint.
